idea.problem: Companies struggle to manage and optimize their cloud infrastructure
idea.solution: A cloud management platform that provides tools for optimizing and automating cloud infrastructure
idea.why_now: The increasing adoption of cloud computing has created a need for more efficient and scalable cloud management tools
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Companies already spend money on cloud infrastructure, cloud management software, and personnel

title: A Cloud ManagementAI
tagline: A cloud management platform that provides tools for optimizing and automating cloud infrastructure
validation_steps: Post in 3 niche communities where Cloud engineers and DevOps teams hangs out
DM 20 potential users with a personalised problem framing
Offer a free 7-day trial in exchange for a 15-min onboarding call
Charge on day 8 using Stripe Payment Link
